assertions.description: U1 is an SMD footprint with 20 pads, yet pad_summary.smd_apertures = 0 and smd_ratio = 0.0. The smd_source is 'x2_aperture_function' which relies on gerber data not PCB data, so the PCB analyzer should derive SMD counts from footprint type directly.
